sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Activity, Server, Users, HardDrive, Cpu, MemoryStick, Wifi, WifiOff, RefreshCw, TrendingUp, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell, AreaChart, Area } from 'recharts'; function Dashboard({ stats, devices, loading, onRefresh }) { const [time, setTime] = useState(new Date()); useEffect(() => { const timer = setInterval(() => setTime(new Date()), 1000); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, []); const onlineDevices = devices.filter(d => d.status === 'online').length; const offlineDevices = devices.filter(d => d.status === 'offline').length; const brasCount = devices.filter(d => d.device_type === 'bras').length; const health = stats?.server_health || { cpu: 0, ram: 0, disk: 0 }; const statusData = [ { name: 'Online', value: onlineDevices, color: '#22c55e' }, { name: 'Offline', value: offlineDevices, color: '#ef4444' }, ]; const pppoeData = (stats?.pppoe_details || devices.filter(d => d.device_type === 'bras')) .map((item, i) => ({ name: (item.name || '').substring(0, 10), pppoe: item.count || 0 })); return (
{/* Header */}

Dashboard NOC

LOR CGR - Centralized Network Management

{time.toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR')}
{time.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}
{/* Stats Cards */}
Total Dispositivos
{devices.length}

{onlineDevices} online, {offlineDevices} offline

BRAS Ativos
{brasCount}

Todos operacionais

PPPoE Total
{(stats?.pppoe_total || 0).toLocaleString()}

+2.5% vs ontem

Alertas
{offlineDevices}

{offlineDevices > 0 ? 'Dispositivos offline' : 'Nenhum alerta'}

{/* Server Health */}
{[ { label: 'CPU', value: health.cpu, icon: Cpu }, { label: 'RAM', value: health.ram, icon: MemoryStick }, { label: 'Disco', value: health.disk, icon: HardDrive }, ].map((item) => { const Icon = item.icon; const percentage = item.value || 0; const color = percentage > 80 ? 'bg-red-500' : percentage > 60 ? 'bg-yellow-500' : 'bg-green-500'; return (
{item.label}
{percentage.toFixed(1)}%
); })}
{/* Charts */}

PPPoE por BRAS

Status dos Dispositivos

name + ': ' + value} > {statusData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
Online: {onlineDevices} Offline: {offlineDevices}
{/* Device List */}

Equipamentos Monitorados

{devices.map((device) => (
{device.status === 'online' ? : }
{device.name}
{device.ip}:{device.port}
{device.device_type} {device.vendor} {device.pppoe_count > 0 && ( {device.pppoe_count} PPPoE )}
))}
); } export default Dashboard;
